expected.notes: Entity was formed last year, not this year, so formation_age != this_year and the rule must not fire.

probe_intent:
Generate a synthetic case where the engine must NOT fire rule 'first_year_filing_deadlines', but that structurally resembles a case that WOULD fire it. Produce a case where ONE of the rule's conditions is deliberately not satisfied while the others are. Rule conditions:
  - answers.formation_age eq this_year
No real PII or real-looking government identifiers.
